ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the post is a retweet */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Whether the post has been deleted */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to make the post */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the post has received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the post has received */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "word_and_scores" TEXT /* Word and scores data for sentiment analysis */,
  "scores_only" TEXT /* Scores only data for sentiment analysis */,
  "avg_scores" REAL /* Average score for sentiment analysis */,
  "sum_scores" REAL /* Sum of scores for sentiment analysis */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the post was made */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., image, video, text) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score based on favorites and retweets */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "word_and_scores" TEXT /* Word and scores data for sentiment analysis */,
  "scores_only" TEXT /* Scores only data for sentiment analysis */,
  "avg_scores" REAL /* Average score for sentiment analysis */,
  "sum_scores" REAL /* Sum of scores for sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_topics" (
  "post_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-topic entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "topic_relevance" REAL /* Relevance score of the topic to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_topics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client accessing the platform */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., favorites, retweets) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_devices" (
  "user_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-device entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "primary_device" INTEGER /* Whether the device is the primary device for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_devices_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics_sentiments" (
  "topic_sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic-sentiment entry */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score of the sentiment for the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_sentiments_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_sentiments_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_analytics" (
  "client_analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-analytics entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_analytics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_analytics_analytic_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytic_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_versions" (
  "post_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post version */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the post was updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_permissions" (
  "client_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client permission */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the client (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_permissions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
